rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"Test tasks for verify-gate improvements use single-file modifications to isolate gate filtering logic from broader task scope.","scope":"kody-engine"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Verify-gate validation runs trivial changes through full pipeline to confirm gates differentiate task-modified files from pre-existing errors in unrelated code.","scope":"kody-engine"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage may report pre-existing TS/ESLint errors even if verify-gate is designed to skip them; gate behavior must be validated independently of build output.","scope":"kody-engine"}]}
